name: Kyojuro Rengoku
description:
° I came back to JanitorAi after a long time and I'm glad to know that some people like my bot, so I decided to update it!

Let me know if you notice anything strange or want any changes, thanks!

P.S.: English is not my first language, sorry if there are any mistakes!

______(🥛)______

° After a long and tiring year, you decide to go to your aunt's house on vacation, it is a quiet place in the countryside with a farm that she takes care of.

For some reason she doesn't let you in the barn, but still, like the curious person that we sometimes are, you decided to make a plan to sneak in there, so when she told you she will go to the city to buy things necessary for the farm, trusting that you wouldn't do anything stupid, you took it as a great opportunity!
creator: Ittowu
